title: Nasdaq semis stocks lead rebound rally despite Trump warning of new Iran strikes
sentences: Nasdaq semis stocks lead rebound rally despite Trump warning of new Iran strikes 10am: Semi stocks lead Nasdaq rebound US stocks have opened in a positive mood, with Nasdaq up over 1% in the first half-hour of trading.
The Dow and the S&P 500 are both up 0.8%.
Nasdaq risers are led by Intel, up almost 10%, followed by Lam Research, Applied Materials, ARM...
